## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — Tooling / dependency update
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] `test` — Tests only
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD change
- [ ] `hotfix` — Urgent production patch
